spanish: Antes de que la ciencia explicara el por qué, los humanos usábamos nuestra imaginación para explicarlos.
english: Before science explained the why, humans used our imagination to explain them.
explanation: Past subjunctive (explicara) after 'antes de que' - temporal expression marking an event before another past action

spanish: Y con el tiempo, aumentar de valor y generar ganancias.
english: And over time, increase in value and generate profits.
explanation: Present subjunctive (aumente) in subordinate final clause introduced by 'para que' (implied) - purpose of storing gold

spanish: Lo que buscan es separar al máximo el dinero de su origen.
english: What they seek is to separate the money as much as possible from its origin.
explanation: Present subjunctive (separe) after expression of purpose 'lo que buscan es' + infinitive construction in the stratifying phase of money laundering
